message:
Running command: # The synthesis netlist has these 2 ports - need to either:
# Option A: Remove them from the netlist directly (risky - regex surgery on netlist)
# Option B: Re-run synthesis from scratch (safer - wrapper.v is now fixed)
# Option C: Patch the synthesis netlist + the ODB at applydeftemplate step (hacky)
# 
# BEST: Re-run full flow from scratch since synthesis is the 3rd step and wrapper.v is clean now
# The previous synthesis took ~20 min, so the full re-run will regenerate a clean netlist.
# Delete the pnr_run_v2 run dir and restart

# Actually, let's first try to surgically patch the netlist to save time (~20min synthesis)
# Check the exact lines containing the ports
grep -n "reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h\|reset_n_pad_a_noesd_h" \
    /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/03-yosys-synthesis/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.nl.v
